transcript: So you're telling me you met the guy who delivers death to every doorstep and you survived? Look, he doesn't just show up in a UPS box. He shows up in mailboxes, birthday boxes, food boxes, toolboxes. This guy is nothing but a killing machine! Breathe, Franklin! Franklin, breathe! Okay? I'm gonna let you know what happened. I was down at the docks delivering a pizza. Hey, I think this is Industrial Drive. I got a pizza for Mr. Jax. Oh. Who sent you here? Um, uh, you know, the pizzeria. Pudgy's Pizzeria. Oh, hey! Boys, get rid of them. How about this? I'll give you guys the pizza for free. Maybe I can even throw in some of Pudgy's famous cheesy breadsticks on the house. Were you scared? Those goons, man, they were terrified. terrified but me you know i kept my cool you got me into this you're gonna get me out too i would love to step on it kid well you're not gonna be delivering pizzas anymore well you're gonna have to take that up with my boss say another word and i'll cut your throat. What is it, kid? Wait, the glove box? Yeah, man, the glove box. Hold on one sec. Mr. Assassin, sir, please, please just wait. Just wait. I promise I won't say anything. Please, please just let me go man i'm not sure that's gonna come out with just soap and water you could try scrubbing that with some bleach you know what here a tip for your trouble he actually seems like a pretty good guy yeah he's
